modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Reporting an injury that happened at work.

full_description_text: So, the caller was trying to figure out how to report an injury that happened while they were working. They seemed a bit confused about the whole process and just wanted to know what steps to take next. It was clear they needed some guidance on filling out the injury form.
short_description: Reporting an injury that happened at work.
description: So, the caller was trying to figure out how to report an injury that happened while they were working. They seemed a bit confused about the whole process and just wanted to know what steps to take next. It was clear they needed some guidance on filling out the injury form.
